meta.tourName: 湖光山色．日月漫遊二日遊
meta.assemblyPlace: 高雄市鳳山區鳳頂路181號（全家便利商店鳳山鳳庄店）

days.title: 清境農場青青草原、鹿篙咖啡莊園
days.dinner: 包棟民宿烤肉DIY（附烤肉食材）

days.title: HOHOCHA喝喝茶、日月潭遊湖、竹山紫南宮

tips.weather: 出發前請留意天氣預報，並準備適當防護用品如雨傘或雨衣，以因應天候變化
tips.toiletries: 因應政府環保政策，自2025年起旅宿業不主動提供一次性備品（如牙刷、牙膏、刮鬍刀、浴帽等），請旅客自行攜帶個人盥洗用品

beforeDepart: 若有長期用藥或特殊醫療需求，請自行攜帶必要藥品及器材
容易暈車、暈船者請自備暈車藥並提前服用
自行攜帶個人盥洗用品

rules: 於高雄市鳳山區鳳頂路181號（全家便利商店鳳山鳳庄店）集合出發
07:50於屏東縣崁頂交流道口（3號交流道往北上方向路邊）停靠點接人

days.title: Cingjing Farm Green Grassland, Lugu Coffee Estate
days.dinner: Private Villa BBQ DIY (BBQ ingredients included)
days.hotel: Sun Moon Lake Secret Retreat Private Villa

days.title: HOHOCHA Tea Plantation, Sun Moon Lake Cruise, Zhushan Zinan Temple
days.lunch: Ita Thao Old Street (at own expense)
days.dinner: Return home, meals at own expense

beforeDepart: For those with long-term medication or special medical needs, please bring necessary medicines and equipment
Those prone to motion sickness or seasickness should bring motion sickness medication and take in advance

rules: Meet and depart at No. 181, Fengding Road, Fengshan District, Kaohsiung City (FamilyMart Fengshan Fengzhuang Store)
07:50 pickup point at Kanding Interchange, Pingtung County (Interchange No. 3 northbound roadside)

tips.weather: Please check the weather forecast before departure and prepare appropriate protective items such as umbrellas or raincoats to cope with weather changes
tips.toiletries: In accordance with government environmental protection policies, starting from 2025, accommodation providers will not actively provide disposable amenities (such as toothbrushes, toothpaste, razors, shower caps, etc.). Please bring your own personal toiletries
